title: Fix error on resized lvalues with warning suppressed

features.name: virtual task output arg width mismatch with resize
features.description: Code should include a virtual task call where an output argument has a 64-bit type but is connected to a 32-bit variable, requiring width expansion

features.name: virtual task method call on class instance
features.description: Code should include calling a virtual task method on a class instance accessed through a nested class hierarchy with dynamic dispatch

features.name: resizelvalue with WIDTHEXPAND warning suppressed
features.description: Code should include a width expansion scenario that generates a RESIZELVALUE node when WIDTHEXPAND warnings are suppressed
